objectives: Set up a productive development workflow using the command line
Practice core programming constructs through small exercises
Use Git to track changes and collaborate safely
learning_path.title: Programming Foundations and Command-Line Workflow

objectives: Implement and analyze common data structures
Apply algorithmic techniques to solve programming tasks
Reason about time and space complexity in solutions
learning_path.title: Data Structures and Algorithms for Practical Problem Solving

objectives: Explain the request/response lifecycle and core HTTP methods
Use HTTP status codes and headers appropriately
Build simple web endpoints and clients to exercise HTTP behavior
learning_path.title: Web Programming Basics and HTTP/HTTPS Fundamentals

objectives: Design resource-oriented endpoints with consistent naming and semantics
Define request/response payloads and error formats
Implement CRUD endpoints and validate behavior with real HTTP calls
learning_path.title: RESTful API Design and Implementation

objectives: Model entities and relationships for a real application domain
Normalize schemas to reduce redundancy and anomalies
Translate a conceptual model into relational tables and constraints
learning_path.title: Database Design and Normalization

objectives: Write SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE queries for common use cases
Use joins, aggregations, and indexes effectively
Integrate SQL queries into application flows and troubleshoot performance basics
learning_path.title: SQL with PostgreSQL/MySQL for Application Data Access

objectives: Differentiate authentication vs authorization and common threat models
Implement token-based authentication using JWT
Apply authorization rules to protect REST endpoints
learning_path.title: Authentication and Authorization with OAuth2/JWT

objectives: Write unit tests for core business logic and edge cases
Create integration tests for APIs and database interactions
Use Git workflows to keep tests reliable during changes
learning_path.title: Testing: Unit and Integration Strategies

objectives: Identify caching opportunities and choose appropriate cache patterns
Implement cache reads/writes and handle invalidation scenarios
Measure and reason about latency improvements and consistency tradeoffs
learning_path.title: Caching with Redis/Memcached for Performance and Scalability

objectives: Explain asynchronous messaging vs synchronous request/response
Design producers/consumers and message contracts for reliability
Implement background processing and handle retries and failures
learning_path.title: Message Queues and Event Streaming with Kafka/RabbitMQ

objectives: Containerize an application and its dependencies
Use Docker to run databases, caches, and services consistently
Troubleshoot common container networking and configuration issues
learning_path.title: Containerization with Docker for Local Development and Deployment

objectives: Apply common UI design patterns to improve usability and consistency
Structure UI components and flows to match API capabilities
Align UI behavior with authentication and error-handling patterns
learning_path.title: Software UI Design Patterns for Web Applications

matched_occupation.description: User interface developers implement, code, document and maintain the interface of a software system by using front-end development technologies.
matched_occupation.label: user interface developer
